news.summary: The organization has secured $170 million in fresh funding as part of its efforts to facilitate connections between data centers and other enterprises in the era of artificial intelligence.
news.headline: Tech company Meter secures $170M funding to facilitate connectivity for data centers and businesses amidst AI era.

news.summary: Booz Allen Hamilton, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange as BAH, revealed that its office in Colorado Springs has been honored with the highly esteemed James S. Cogswell Award by the Defense Counterintelligence and Security Agency (DCSA). This award is a rare recognition, with less than 1% of the over 13,000 cleared eligible entities within the Department of Defense’s (DOD) National Industrial Security Program (NISP) being recipients. The accolade is granted to organizations that exhibit exceptional security practices that surpass the standard NISP regulations.
news.headline: Booz Allen Hamilton's Colorado Springs office wins 2025 Cogswell Award for Security Excellence. Prestigious award from DCSA for maintaining top security program. Less than 1% of 13,000 recipients in DOD's NISP receive award.

news.summary: Pre-order now available for the hard-cover anniversary edition of Author Sandy Rosenthal's acclaimed book recounting the events of the 2005 hurricane and levee failures in New Orleans. Turner Publishing has released this special edition commemorating the anniversary. The book, "Words Whispered in," has won several awards and offers a detailed account of the tragic events. Interested readers can secure their copy by pre-ordering.
news.headline: Special 20th anniversary edition of "Words Whispered in Water" explores why levees broke during Hurricane Katrina. Pre-order now.

news.summary: In Auburn, Alabama, on June 12, 2025, Associate Professor Andrew Pendola from Auburn University's College of Education conducted research on a new school funding formula for the state. This initiative was geared towards enhancing the educational prospects of students and was founded on a forward-looking approach.
news.headline: Auburn Univ. prof. Andrew Pendola's research on new AL school funding formula builds on late colleague's work, future impact.

news.summary: In Westminster, Colorado on June 12, 2025, a group of experts convened to discuss the current challenges and potential solutions within the crop protection sector. Noteworthy members representing the Weed Science Society of America (WSSA) offered their insights during the meeting hosted by the Council of Producers and Distributors of Agrotechnology. The experts delved into key issues impacting the industry, emphasizing the importance of finding effective strategies moving forward. The event provided a platform for sharing crucial knowledge and addressing pressing concerns within the sector.
news.headline: WSSA members discuss crop protection at agrotechnology meeting in Westminster, Colo. Experts share challenges and solutions.

news.summary: Seekr has selected OCI AI Infrastructure and AMD GPUs to quickly implement secure and transparent enterprise AI solutions and create cutting-edge vision-language foundation models. Based in Austin, Texas, this artificial intelligence company is dedicated to providing reliable AI services. The decision was made on June 12, 2025, showcasing Seekr's commitment to leveraging advanced technology.
news.headline: Seekr partners with Oracle Cloud Infrastructure for AI, using AMD GPUs for secure enterprise AI, June 12, 2025.

news.summary: In a significant advancement for St. Louis' AgTech sector, a team based in the city has initiated construction on the EpiCrop Research Facility. This 18,000-square-foot facility will serve as the headquarters for EpiCrop Technologies, a branch of EpiMethyl, signaling growth in innovative agricultural practices in the region.
news.headline: Blackline Design + Construction begins work on 18,000 sq ft EpiCrop Research Facility in St. Louis for EpiCrop Technologies.

news.summary: On June 11, 2025, Fourth Avenue Capital and Range Equity Management, in partnership with PCCP, completed the purchase of 2121 Belmont, a well-maintained Class-A multifamily complex situated in the Buckman area of Portland, Oregon. This acquisition marks a significant step for Fourth Avenue Capital and Range Equity Management in expanding their portfolio in the region.
news.headline: 2121 Belmont Apartments in Portland, OR acquired by Fourth Avenue Capital and Range Equity Management with PCCP, joint venture.
ECB's de Guindos: The ECB concern has shifted from inflation to slow growth.

news.summary: Marriott International has unveiled MARRIOTT MEDIA, a step forward in enhancing its network abilities by prioritizing personalization and curated brand integration in the travel sector. This initiative was introduced in Bethesda, Md., on June 12, 2025, emphasizing a pivotal shift and fresh direction for the company.
news.headline: Marriott International launches MARRIOTT MEDIA, a new media network for travelers, revolutionizing brand integration.

news.summary: In a groundbreaking development, Arelion has released its DDoS Threat Landscape Report for 2025, providing an extensive examination of Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks. The report comes at a critical time as global tensions and evolving attack methods reshape the cybersecurity landscape. This year's report reveals record-breaking peak traffic numbers, highlighting the escalating threat posed by DDoS attacks. The data underscores the urgent need for heightened vigilance and advanced defense strategies to combat the growing cyber threat.
news.headline: Arelion's 2025 DDoS Threat Report shows increased scale and sophistication, with record peak traffic and sector-specific targeting.

news.summary: It is projected that assets in active ETFs will increase significantly to $1.2 trillion by 2027, up from a mere $81 billion in 2019. The top 10 active asset managers currently have control over 77% of these assets, revealing a notable concentration issue in the market. Surprisingly, only 11% of active ETFs introduced within the last three years managed to raise over $100 million in funding.
news.headline: Active ETF assets soared 600% to $1.2TAUM by 2027 from $81B in 2019. Top 10 managers own 77% of assets, 11% new funds raised $100M+.

news.summary: A cutting-edge facility in Pageland, South Carolina, has been unveiled by ATI Inc. (NYSE: ATI) on June 12, 2025, aimed at manufacturing titanium alloy sheet, a vital component for aerostructures. This product is known for its complexity in production processes.
news.headline: ATI expands with new facility in SC to produce titanium alloy sheet for aerospace, a critical product.

news.summary: OCI Global, a company listed on Euronext under the ticker OCI, disclosed on June 12, 2025, that the regulatory review process under the U.S. Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Act has been completed regarding the sale of all its ownership stakes in Global Methanol.
news.headline: OCI Global has received U.S. regulatory approval to sell its Global Methanol business to Methanex Corporation.

news.summary: Recent statistics from a top provider of voice authentication and fraud prevention reveal a concerning trend: fraudulent activities in U.S. contact centers are now happening approximately every 46 seconds. Synthetic voice attacks have seen a significant surge across various sectors, with an alarming increase in retail (up by 107%), banking (up by 149%), and insurance (up by 475%). These numbers underscore the growing threat posed by fraudulent activities in the contact center industry. The data was released in Atlanta on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: Pindrop's 2025 report shows +1,300% rise in deepfake fraud, with fraud attempts every 46 seconds in US contact centers.

news.summary: Binance, a leading global blockchain platform, has received positive feedback from 91% of users regarding its new UI/UX experience. This marks a significant shift as Binance becomes the first major crypto exchange to move away from a "one-size-fits-all" approach. The platform now offers smart widgets and a customizable homepage for users. This development was revealed in Dubai, UAE, on June 12, 2025.
news.headline: Binance introduces AI-powered UI/UX, with 91% positive user feedback, moving away from "one-size-fits-all model".

news.summary: In the eight-part season, a mix of emotional anecdotes, personal narratives, and expert recommendations underscore the necessity of preparing for a stable financial tomorrow. Lo Bosworth, a wellness entrepreneur and former television personality, delves into her recent engagement, outlining her plans for the future and the steps she is taking.
news.headline: Northwestern Mutual's podcast "A Better Way to Money®" Season 2 provides financial advice through eight episodes with emotional insights. Former TV star Lo Bosworth shares about her engagement and future planning.

news.summary: A prominent provider of dealer management solutions, VitalEdge Technologies, has introduced an enhanced mobile-friendly Learning Management System (LMS) that optimizes dealer onboarding, certification, and skill enhancement. This initiative, announced on June 12, 2025, in Cary, North Carolina, aims to maximize technology Return on Investment (ROI) for businesses.
news.headline: VitalEdge Technologies expands LMS for dealer and OEM training, streamlining onboarding & skill development. #PRNewswire #Cary.

news.summary: On June 11, 2025, in Boston, VectorWave Corporation disclosed that it has secured $2.5 million in seed funding. Leading this funding round are dual-use investor J2 Ventures and Coalition Ventures. Established in 2024 by Dr. Ronald Davis, VectorWave aims to bring analog technology to market for commercial purposes. For more details, visit J2 Ventures at www.j2vp.com and Coalition Ventures at www.coalition.ventures.
news.headline: VectorWave secures $2.5M in seed funding from J2 Ventures and Coalition Ventures to innovate electromagnetic spectrum usage.

news.summary: Today, Lafayette Square revealed its provision of debt and equity funds to aid Mosaic Capital Partners LLC in their investment in IE Group Holdings, Inc. Known as Ickler Electric, the San Diego-based electrical contractor is set to benefit from this support. The exact amount of capital has not been disclosed as of yet.
news.headline: Lafayette Square provides financing to support Ickler Electric's employee stock ownership plan (ESOP) through Mosaic Capital Partners LLC.

news.summary: In Lehi, Utah on June 12, 2025, Biolexis Therapeutics, Inc., a company focused on developing advanced treatments for metabolic and muscle-wasting disorders, revealed the commencement of Phase I clinical trials for its primary GLP-1 therapy. This clinical-stage company is striving to innovate in this field. For more information visit www.biolexistx.com.
news.headline: Biolexis Therapeutics initiates Phase I clinical trials for GLP-1 and AMPK programs, targeting metabolic diseases.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on June 12, 2025, Methanex Corporation (TSX:MX) (Nasdaq:MEOH) revealed that the U.S. Hart-Scott-Rodino Antitrust Act's regulatory review period has expired. Methanex has secured all necessary regulatory approvals to finalize the acquisition of OCI Global’s international methanol business as per the announcement. The anticipated closure date for this transaction is June 27, 2025, pending the fulfillment of standard closing requirements.
news.headline: Methanex Corp (TSX:MX) gains regulatory approval for the acquisition of OCI Global's methanol business. Deal expected to close on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: Stingray, a prominent player in music and video content distribution, business services, and advertising solutions, has proudly played a role in the launch of BMO's latest branch at CF Toronto Eaton Centre. This cutting-edge branch, located at the bustling corner of Yonge and Dundas near Sankofa Square, a renowned intersection in Toronto, aims to enhance customer experiences through technology. The two-story branch boasts state-of-the-art digital signage solutions courtesy of Stingray Business. By leveraging the ample space and visibility offered by the wraparound windows, BMO aims to not only boost its brand visibility but also demonstrate a fresh approach to marketing while ensuring a cozy atmosphere for customers. In a strategic move, BMO collaborated with Stingray Business to introduce this innovative digital signage solution, effectively combining technology with customer service.
news.headline: Stingray partners with BMO for digital signage at CF Toronto Eaton Centre, enhancing customer experience with technology.
China can also engage in the 'small yard, high fence' strategy, following recent developments in the market.

news.summary: The National Hispanic Construction Alliance (NHCA) has established its first National Board of Directors with the support of the National Association of Hispanic Real Estate Professionals (NAHREP®) to empower Hispanic workers in the construction industry. Hispanic workers make up more than 30% of the U.S. construction workforce and have driven nearly 60% of the industry's workforce growth in recent years. However, only 15.72% of Hispanic construction workers hold management or supervisory positions, showing a significant disparity compared to their non-Hispanic counterparts. The NHCA aims to provide capacity-building, access to capital, and business opportunities for its members to address these inequalities and foster growth in the construction sector. This initiative highlights the vital role of Hispanic workers in shaping the nation's infrastructure and housing stock.
news.headline: NHCA announces Board of Directors to empower Hispanic construction workers; 30% of workforce but only 15.72% in management.

news.summary: A recent partnership was announced between Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) and DICK’S Sporting Goods, Inc. (NYSE: DKS), where the latter's wide range of products including sporting goods, athletic apparel, footwear, team sports gear, golf equipment, and fan merchandise will now be offered on the Uber Eats platform. This partnership adds over 800 DICK’S Sporting Goods and Golf Galaxy locations to Uber Eats across the country starting this week. Customers will have the convenience of accessing these products through on-demand or scheduled delivery services.
news.headline: DICK’S and Golf Galaxy partner with Uber Eats; 800+ locations offering sports gear, apparel & more for delivery.

news.summary: Mercurity is planning to raise $800 million through a Bitcoin treasury financing initiative. This move would position the firm as the 11th largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, trailing behind Galaxy Digital.
news.headline: Fintech firm Mercurity plans to raise $800M for Bitcoin treasury, aiming to become the 11th largest corporate holder.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Richmond, Virginia, The Brink’s Company (NYSE: BCO), a key player in cash and valuables management, digital retail solutions, and ATM managed services ("AMS"), revealed a significant investment in KAL ATM Software, a renowned entity in ATM software worldwide. This move signifies a pivotal point in Brink’s AMS approach, underlining its dedication to offering top-notch solutions to financial institutions on a global scale.
news.headline: Brink’s invests in KAL ATM Software to enhance ATM managed services for financial institutions worldwide. Strategic move by Brink’s to deliver top solutions. #Investment #ATM #FinancialInstitutions

news.summary: Vortex Energy is set to conduct a geophysical survey at the Robinsons River Salt Project with the aim of evaluating its potential for hydrogen storage. The survey is set to commence in the coming weeks and will cover a significant area of the project site. The primary focus of the survey will be to assess the feasibility of utilizing the site for hydrogen storage, which is considered a key component of renewable energy storage solutions. This initiative is part of Vortex Energy's commitment to sustainable energy practices. The survey is expected to take several weeks to complete and will involve the collection of data from various geophysical measurements. The results of the survey will provide valuable insights into the potential for hydrogen storage at the Robinsons River Salt Project, contributing to the advancement of renewable energy technologies.
news.headline: Vortex Energy to conduct ambient noise tomography survey at Robinsons River Salt Project to assess hydrogen storage potential.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, Richtech Robotics Inc. (Nasdaq: RR), a Nevada company specializing in AI-driven service robots, revealed that its Titan robot received the Robotics Innovation of the Year award at the 4th annual SupplyTech Breakthrough Awards. This robot is tailored to enhance efficiency and revenue in sectors like automotive repair, enabling workers to operate more efficiently and productively. This recognition highlights the significance of the Titan robot's impact on industry advancements in the realm of technology and automation.
news.headline: Richtech Robotics' Titan wins Robotics Innovation of the Year at SupplyTech Breakthrough Awards, enhancing efficiency & revenue in automotive repair.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, DiagnaMed Holdings Corp. (DMED) appointed John Karagiannidis as the new President and CEO, taking over from Fabio Chianelli. The company, known for advanced hydrogen extraction technologies, disclosed this change as Chianelli transitions to a Board of Directors role. DiagnaMed trades as DMED on the CSE and DGNMF on the OTCQB.
news.headline: DiagnaMed appoints John Karagiannidis as President & CEO as Fabio Chianelli transitions to Director role. Strengthening partnership with QIMC to accelerate natural hydrogen development in Ontario. CSE: DMED, OTCQB: DGNMF.

news.summary: The article discusses the strategies implemented by the Board to enhance long-term stockholder value and their track record of successful oversight.
news.headline: Oportun's Lead Independent Director Neil Williams addresses stockholders, highlighting board's measures for increasing long-term stockholder value.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) disclosed a significant update. The company, known as the pioneer U.S. public entity focusing on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL) within its treasury strategy, revealed its recent agreement. Under the terms of the ELOC (share purchase agreement), DeFi Development Corp. has entered into a partnership with RK Capital Management LLC.
news.headline: DeFi Development Corp. secures $5 billion equity line of credit with RK Capital Management in Solana treasury strategy.

news.summary: An upcoming strategic partnership is set to revolutionize the residential real estate sector by enhancing the accessibility and efficiency of transactions. The alliance will involve the integration of MiiX’s exclusive platform within La Rosa’s network. This collaboration is anticipated to significantly impact the industry by streamlining processes and creating a more user-friendly experience for clients. Keep an eye on this development as it could potentially reshape how residential real estate operates.
news.headline: La Rosa Holdings Corp. partners with MiiX Financial Holdings for credit-free home financing program to enhance real estate accessibility.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in Los Angeles, LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO), a prominent creator-focused music, entertainment, and technology platform, unveiled a collaboration with the emerging combat sport BKFC Ice Wars for the "Battle of the Border" event featuring USA versus Canada.
news.headline: LiveOne (Nasdaq: LVO) partners with BKFC Ice Wars for "Battle of the Border" fight night, streaming in over 200 countries.

news.summary: CLEAR1's Identity Platform has been incorporated into Greenhouse Real Talent™ through a recent collaboration. This integration aims to enhance security and trust within the platform. With this partnership, users can benefit from advanced security features provided by CLEAR1's platform. This has led to a significant increase in trust levels among users of Greenhouse Real Talent™.
news.headline: CLEAR and Greenhouse have partnered to integrate CLEAR1's Identity Platform into Greenhouse Real Talent for enhanced security and trust.
ECB's de Guindos: The Euro Area economy has proved fairly resilient to date, supported by a strong labour market.
ECB's de Guindos: But the role of the Euro can gradually expand, especially if we deliver on “more Europe”.

news.summary: Impressive growth from its inception solidifies Rezolve Ai as a leader in Enterprise AI, backed by key partnerships with industry giants Microsoft and Google.
news.headline: Rezolve Ai surpasses $70M ARR ahead of plan; aims for $100M ARR by year-end with Microsoft and Google partnerships.
ECB's de Guindos: The use of the US dollar in international funding, payment and trade transactions, or as a reserve currency, will not be challenged in the short term.
ECB'S DE GUINDOS: RECENT DEVELOPMENTS MAY WELL HAVE A DAMPENING IMPACT ON GROWTH IN THE EURO AREA

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on June 12, 2025, Lancaster Resources Inc. (CSE:LCR) (OTC Pink:LANRF) (FRA:6UF) has successfully acquired a 100% stake in the Lac Iris Polymetallic Project situated in the James Bay area of Quebec. The property is strategically positioned just 5 kilometers to the south of the noteworthy Nisk and Lion discoveries made by Power Metallic Inc. It is also contiguous to the Li-FT Power Ltd. Rupert Lithium Project. This acquisition not only bolsters Lancaster's land holdings in the James Bay region but also complements its existing option on the Trans-Taiga Project within the same area.
news.headline: Lancaster Resources Inc. acquires 100% interest in Lac Iris Polymetallic Project in Quebec's James Bay, expanding its land position in the region.

news.summary: Integral Metals has finished Phase 2 soil sampling at the KAP Project to improve drill targeting for the 2025 exploration. This process involved collecting and analyzing soil samples to identify potential drilling locations. The completion of this phase marks a significant step in the exploration process, as it provides valuable data for planning future drilling activities. By enhancing drill targeting, Integral Metals aims to optimize its exploration efforts and maximize the chances of discovering valuable mineral deposits. This initiative is part of the company's broader strategy to accelerate exploration activities and achieve its exploration targets. With this development, Integral Metals is well-positioned to advance its exploration program and unlock the full potential of the KAP Project.
news.headline: Integral Metals finished high-resolution soil sampling at KAP Project, improving drill targeting for 2025 exploration.

news.summary: On June 12, 2025, in San Diego, Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: KTOS), a tech company in Defense, National Security, and Global Markets, revealed its involvement in NATO’s At-Sea Demonstration (ASD)/Formidable Shield (FS) 25. This significant live-fire drill, the largest in Europe, occurs biennially and is overseen by the U.S. 6th Fleet and conducted by Naval Striking and Support Forces NATO.
news.headline: Kratos ARAV-B target intercepted by USS Bulkeley and USS Thomas Hudner with SM-3 during ASD/FS 25 in Europe. Kratos joins live-fire exercise hosted by U.S. 6th Fleet.

news.summary: Following a temporary halt, the company is set to resume trading on the NYSE American on Tuesday, June 17, 2025. Investors and stakeholders anticipate the reopening after the pause. The scheduled date marks a crucial moment for the company's operations, with significant numbers of shares being readied for trading on the renowned exchange. The resumption on the NYSE American is expected to generate notable market activity and interest from various parties involved.
news.headline: AIM ImmunoTech's trading suspension on NYSE American to be lifted on June 17, 2025.
